ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the movie */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* Production companies involved in the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes on the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average vote score on the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "budget_adj" REAL /* Adjusted budget of the movie */,
  "revenue_adj" REAL /* Adjusted revenue of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Age certification or rating */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the trailer */,
  "trailer_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the trailer */,
  "trailer_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the trailer */,
  "trailer_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the trailer */,
  "trailer_share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the trailer has been shared */,
  "trailer_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trailer in seconds */,
  "trailer_release_date" TEXT /* Date the trailer was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is associated with */,
  "cast_member" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the cast member in the credits */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the cast member's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the cast member */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the cast member */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the cast member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casts_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the director is associated with */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the genre is associated with */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the production company is associated with */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the production company's logo */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the production company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the watchlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the watchlist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the review */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie (out of 10) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings given to the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie generating the revenue */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie on a specific date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the revenue was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revenue entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revenue entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie with the budget */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie on a specific date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the budget was allocated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_dates" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release date */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date on which the movie was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release date entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release date entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_dates_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred genre */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred director */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES casts ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the movie was viewed */,
  "duration_watched" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie watched in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the viewing history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the viewing history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
